operatingRule: This pack exists to break sameness in the largest drag-based cluster by assigning each atom a primary differentiation axis.

rows.primaryDifferentiationAxis: Change reveal law: refocus, strip distortion, expose hidden layer
rows.sensorEscalation: Candidate for secondary sensor channel: breath, microphone, or gyroscope if it deepens the law
rows.closureUpgrade: Protect state morph but vary the aftermath so endings do not all feel like the same morph
rows.occupancyUpgrade: Protect hero occupancy; do not let the drag zone shrink into local UI behavior
rows.clusterRule: Differentiate drag atoms by counterforce and destination law, not by visual object theme.

rows.primaryDifferentiationAxis: Change counterforce law so the same drag gesture solves a different equation
rows.sensorEscalation: Candidate for secondary sensor channel: breath, microphone, or gyroscope if it deepens the law
rows.closureUpgrade: Push the field recompose harder so the whole environment visibly reorganizes
rows.occupancyUpgrade: Protect hero occupancy; do not let the drag zone shrink into local UI behavior
rows.clusterRule: Differentiate drag atoms by counterforce and destination law, not by visual object theme.

rows.sensorEscalation: Candidate for secondary sensor channel: breath, microphone, or gyroscope if it deepens the law
rows.closureUpgrade: Upgrade closure into a stronger threshold morph or field aftermath
rows.occupancyUpgrade: Use depth, pressure, or materiality so the atom commands the whole phone
